channel.title: Vedder Cup on Emerald City Gear
channel.description: Recent content in Vedder Cup on Emerald City Gear

item.title: The Vedder Cup Is Back: Everything You Need to Know About the Mariners-Padres Rivalry
item.description: The 2026 Vedder Cup is already underway in San Diego. Here's the full story behind MLB's most delightfully weird rivalry — named after Pearl Jam's Eddie Vedder.
